concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出9条假设，如所有海啸由地震引起、淹没区财产完全摧毁等，为模型简化提供依据。
concepts_used.source_excerpt:
ASSUMPTIONS and JUSTIFICATIONS
1. All tsunamis are caused by earthquakes. ... 9. No flooding occurs outside of the inundation zone.

concepts_used.title: 加权求和评价
concepts_used.how_used: 将海啸破坏分为人类生命威胁、财产损失、社会影响三个子指标，分别量化后加权求和得到总破坏分数（0-100分）。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We defined devastation using three main points: the threat to human life, the cost of damaged property, and the social impact of the destruction. ... Each category’s values were adjusted to fit on the 100-point scale.

concepts_used.title: 地理信息可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 使用淹没地图（inundation maps）确定各城市受淹区域，部分城市使用NOAA官方地图，其他城市自行叠加地形、高程和洪水风险图生成。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Inundation Maps ... we used inundation maps published by NOAA or another government agency. ... we created our own inundation maps by overlaying topographical, elevation, and flood-risk maps.

concepts_used.title: 中心化/归一化/标准化
concepts_used.how_used: 将人类生命威胁、财产损失、社会影响三个子指标的值调整至0-100分制，以便加权求和。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Each category’s values were adjusted to fit on the 100-point scale, in which 0 is no damage and 100 is the complete destruction of the city.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过调整地震震级（即海啸严重程度）来观察破坏分数的变化，并利用海啸震级方程调整破坏值。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: we also utilized a tsunami magnitude equation, which adjusts the devastation value for the severity of the tsunami based on the magnitude of the earthquake.

concepts_used.title: 表格三线表规范
concepts_used.how_used: 使用三线表呈现各城市应急计划评分、疏散计划评分、人口和距离等数据，表格清晰规范。
concepts_used.source_excerpt:
Table 1: Thoroughness of Emergency Plans
Table 2: Thoroughness of Evacuation Plan
Table 3: Human Devastation Category Totals

concepts_used.title: 图表标题与编号规范
concepts_used.how_used: 文中包含地图和表格，均有编号和标题，如Map 1, Map 2, Map 3，并引用附录。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Map 1 Map 2 Map 3 ... Once we had an inundation map for each area (see Appendix A), we measured the area of each inundation zone.

concepts_used.title: 误差度量（R²/相对误差/RMSE）
concepts_used.how_used: 将模型预测结果与近期真实海啸数据对比，验证模型合理性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: To analyze our model, we compared our findings to data from recent tsunamis around the world.
